@if (customTemplate()) { } @else {
{{ comment().author }} @if (comment().status) { {{ comment().status }} }
@if (!ec.expanded() && comment().attachments?.length) { } {{ comment().timestamp | customDateUtc: getDateFormat() }} {{ currentTZ.currentTz?.Abr }}

{{ comment().comment | truncate: (!ec.expanded() ? 50 : comment().comment.length) }}

@if (comment().attachments?.length) { @for (attachment of comment()?.attachments; track getAttachmentTrackId(attachment, $index)) { } }
}
